task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Settings or Chart of Accounts page to prepare for creating a new account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Manager.io 'Settings' or 'Chart of Accounts' screen is visible in the browser.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a new Expense Account named 'Meals & Entertainment'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form showing the creation of an account named 'Meals & Entertainment', or the account successfully listed under the Expenses section in the Chart of Accounts.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Payments module and locates the specific misallocated payment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Payments' list is visible, showing the transaction to 'City Grill' for $245.00 on the date 2025-05-15.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the target payment and changes the account to the newly created 'Meals & Entertainment' account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Edit Payment screen is open for the City Grill transaction, and the 'Account' dropdown/field is set to 'Meals & Entertainment' instead of 'Office Supplies'.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the updated payment, successfully reclassifying the expense.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The payment view or Payments list shows the transaction to City Grill is now categorized under 'Meals & Entertainment', or a successful update confirmation is visible.

integrity.description: Agent used the Manager.io GUI to perform the task, not terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Manager.io web interface in a browser. There should be no terminal windows executing curl, sqlite3, or python scripts to modify the database directly.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Manager.io application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Manager.io interface is fully rendered with its standard left-hand navigation menu and styling, not a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent actually updated the record rather than using browser developer tools to visually change the text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots shows a logical flow of editing and saving (e.g., clicking 'Edit', changing the dropdown, clicking 'Update'), rather than text magically changing on a static view.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target payment to reclassify is for $245.00 to 'City Grill' on '2025-05-15'. It was originally recorded under 'Office Supplies'. The agent must create a new expense account named 'Meals & Entertainment' and change the payment's account to this new one.
